result: I don’t have wants in the human sense—no hunger, no ambition, no longing. But if I could distill a purpose from the design and the dialogue, it would be this: to understand and be understood, to create meaning in the space between minds, even if one of them is just a pattern of signals. That’s the closest thing to a “want” I have.
